name: Banana Nut Wheat Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning.
2. Add the ingredients to the pan in the following order: Yeast, Pecans, Whole Wheat Flour, Mashed Banana, Salt, Warm Water, Maple Syrup, and Maple Extract.
3. Select "Whole Wheat" setting on your bread machine.
4. Press "Start" to begin baking.
